title: Image
description: A boot disk image for launching compute instances. Images can be platform images provided by Oracle, custom images, or Marketplace partner images.

compartmentId.description: The OCID of the compartment containing the image

displayName.description: A user-friendly name for the image. It does not have to be unique, and it is changeable.

operatingSystem.description: The image operating system (e.g., Oracle Linux)

timeCreated.description: The date and time the image was created

baseImageId.description: The OCID of the image originally used to create this custom image

sizeInMBs.description: The boot volume size for an instance launched from this image, in MBs

billableSizeInGBs.description: The billable size of the image in GBs

createImageAllowed.description: Whether instances launched from this image can be used to create new images

agentFeatures.description: Oracle Cloud Agent features supported on the image

launchMode.description: The launch mode of instances created from this image

listingType.description: The listing type of the image
